data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a 'Manual dispute override', which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, the evidence does not provide any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the existence or functionality of this feature. The absence of specific details or endpoints related to the manual dispute override leads to a clear gap in the requirement satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of the implementation or functionality of the manual dispute override.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for manual dispute override functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Provide concrete API endpoints and state checks that validate the manual dispute override feature.
